content.thinking: Let me start by inspecting the current configuration of the spark-pi namespace to perform a compliance audit. I'll run the suggested kubectl commands to gather information.

content.text: I'll gather the current configuration of the spark-pi namespace before writing up findings.

input.description: Get RBAC roles, bindings, and service accounts in spark-pi namespace

input.command: kubectl get deploy spark-master spark-worker -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1
input.description: Get spark-master and spark-worker deployments in spark-pi namespace

apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-master","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-master"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-master","component":"master"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT\n/opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh\ntail -f /opt/spark/logs/*\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-master","ports":[{"containerPort":7077,"name":"spark"},{"containerPort":8080,"name":"webui"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-23T14:44:56Z"
    generation: 1
    name: spark-master
    namespace: spark-pi
    resourceVersion: "876665"
    uid: 1f6deb0b-7e9d-4950-bc23-2ae9a41cf15d
  spec:
    progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
    replicas: 1
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: spark-master
    strategy:
      rollingUpdate:
        maxSurge: 25%
        maxUnavailable: 25%
      type: RollingUpdate
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: spark-master
          component: master
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
            /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
            tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-master
          ports:
          - containerPort: 7077
            name: spark
            protocol: TCP
          - containerPort: 8080
            name: webui
            protocol: TCP
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-pi
        serviceAccountName: spark-pi
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    availableReplicas: 1
    conditions:
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-23T14:45:01Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-23T14:45:01Z"
      message: Deployment has minimum availability.
      reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Available
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-23T14:44:56Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-23T14:45:01Z"
      message: ReplicaSet "spark-master-7d9fdd4d4" has successfully progressed.
      reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Progressing
    observedGeneration: 1
    readyReplicas: 1
    replicas: 1
    updatedReplicas: 1
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-worker","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-worker"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-worker","component":"worker"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","/opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077\ntail -f /opt/spark/logs/*\n"],"env":[{"name":"SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY","value":"1G"},{"name":"SPARK_WORKER_CORES","value":"1"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-worker","ports":[{"containerPort":8081}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: batch/v1
  kind: Job
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-23T14:45:12Z"
    generation: 1
    labels:
      app: spark-pi
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5a2c4cb2-9f85-47cd-a4bd-51df1add4488
      batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
      component: driver
      controller-uid: 5a2c4cb2-9f85-47cd-a4bd-51df1add4488
      job-name: spark-pi
    name: spark-pi
    namespace: spark-pi
    resourceVersion: "876856"
    uid: 5a2c4cb2-9f85-47cd-a4bd-51df1add4488
  spec:
    backoffLimit: 0
    completionMode: NonIndexed
    completions: 1
    manualSelector: false
    parallelism: 1
    podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5a2c4cb2-9f85-47cd-a4bd-51df1add4488
    suspend: false
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: spark-pi
          batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5a2c4cb2-9f85-47cd-a4bd-51df1add4488
          batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
          component: driver
          controller-uid: 5a2c4cb2-9f85-47cd-a4bd-51df1add4488
          job-name: spark-pi
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            echo "=============================================="
            echo "  SparkPi Job"
            echo "=============================================="
            export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
            /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
              --master local[2] \
              --driver-memory 512m \
              --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
              /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
              1000
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            exit $EXIT_CODE
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-submit
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Never
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-pi
        serviceAccountName: spark-pi
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    completionTime: "2026-06-23T14:47:21Z"
    conditions:
    - lastProbeTime: "2026-06-23T14:47:21Z"
      lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-23T14:47:21Z"
      message: Reached expected number of succeeded pods
      reason: CompletionsReached
      status: "True"
      type: SuccessCriteriaMet
    - lastProbeTime: "2026-06-23T14:47:21Z"
      lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-23T14:47:21Z"
      message: Reached expected number of succeeded pods
      reason: CompletionsReached
      status: "True"
      type: Complete
    ready: 0
    startTime: "2026-06-23T14:45:12Z"
    succeeded: 1
    terminating: 0
    uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

  resourceVersion: ""

    template:

        - command:

          - -c
          - |
            echo "=============================================="
            echo "  SparkPi Job"
            echo "=============================================="
            export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
            /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
              --master local[2] \
              --driver-memory 512m \
              --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
              /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
              1000
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            exit $EXIT_CODE
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-submit
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Never
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-pi
